channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Live markets: bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
item.description: Crypto markets continue to struggle even as risk markets across the globe surge higher.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Treasury Firm Strategy Sells 32 BTC for $2.5M
item.description: Bitcoin tumbled to $72,000 Monday as news of the BTC treasury firm's about-face on its "never sell" stance broke.

item.title: Bitcoin below $72,000 as Strategy sold 32 bitcoin sale for $2.5 million in late May
item.description: The 8-K filing Monday says proceeds from the May 26-31 sale, executed at an average price of $77,135 a coin, will fund distributions on Strategy's preferred stock.

item.title: Bitcoin ETPs post largest 2026 outflow as crypto funds bleed $1.67B
item.description: Crypto ETPs see $1.67 billion in outflows as the US dominates selling, Bitcoin funds log a record 2026 exit, and altcoin participation narrows sharply across markets, according to CoinShares.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Losses Near $3B Across 10 Days as YTD Flows Turn Negative
item.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their outflow streak to 10 days, as crypto markets contend with multiple simultaneous headwinds.

item.title: Binance adds US stock trading in push beyond crypto
item.description: Binance launched US equities trading for eligible users and plans tokenized stocks as crypto exchanges expand into broader financial markets.

item.title: ECB official says stablecoins risk importing old market flaws
item.description: ECB board member Isabel Schnabel warned that stablecoins could bring money-market risks into tokenized finance and reinforce US dollar dominance.

item.title: Coinbase Launches Direct Indian Rupee Deposit and Withdrawal Rails
item.description: The U.S. exchange has established direct rupee trading rails for Indian customers after securing regulatory clearance.

item.title: Cardano Summit 2026 canceled after community votes against Foundation funding proposal
item.description: The Cardano Foundation's flagship conference was scrapped after a funding proposal failed to secure the two-thirds support required under the blockchain's new governance system.

item.title: Strategy holds STRC dividend at 11.5% for fourth straight month
item.description: The preferred stock remains near its $100 par value as the company balances yield stability, ATM issuance capacity, and its bitcoin acquisition strategy.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether start June in the red while futures show taste for risk. XLM, HYPE gain
item.description: Bitcoin and ether fell Monday after dropping in May, a month that usually sees them post positive returns. U.S. equity index futures rose.

item.title: Bitcoin and software stocks are breaking up — and history says a major crypto move is coming
item.description: Bitcoin and software equities have sharply diverged after moving in lockstep for years, raising questions over whether bitcoin will eventually catch up.

item.title: What Is BChat? The Decentralized Messaging App Built for Privacy
item.description: Built on the Beldex Network, BChat aims to solve the weaknesses of relying solely on end-to-end encryption (E2EE) for private messaging.

item.title: Coinbase launches rupee bank rails in India after FIU nod
item.description: Coinbase has switched on direct rupee bank transfers in India via IMPS, letting users move funds between local bank accounts and the exchange for spot and futures trading.

item.title: Trump says Iran will ‘work out well’: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin price headed below $72,000 on Iran woes as US President Donald Trump told observers to "sit back and relax" with a ceasefire still unresolved.

item.title: U.S. Congress returns as GENIUS comments periods close, jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 1.

item.title: #Bitcoin is going for my main scenario for entries from a day-trading perspective. A sweep of the lows and a reversal back upwards would be great to look for an entry when it flips the level back. I don't think we'll continue to fall, so this remains my primary scena - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9aVnFPa29jQWZYaFBVZjNleG8xWmd3bHNqajh3b0tLMXRrOHVzS1ZXbk1FSGFBUU5nQWlKZEFXdXlBdHE5U0libGJUY0hIc2tpUEt0blZsNWcyV09xZHI0amtUcw?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin is going for my main sc…

item.title: BREAKING: PUBLIC COMMENT PERIOD ON RULE TO ALLOW #BITCOIN IN EVERY US 401(K) OFFICIALLY CLOSES TODAY $13 TRILLION IN RETIREMENT SAVINGS IS HEADING FOR BTC TIGHTEN YOUR SEATBELTS 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1MUFVBTF95aGVkUFF2WkdJcmRTYkpCY3R1RWY2OFRldDRlM3pVcmZMc096Mlc4ZkFwLVpPbWEzM09IT1ZxQWZNeU5pbkp0ZElua0hTbW5uQ0ZPX21CZFJCeFZR?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: PUBLIC COMMENT PERIOD ON…

item.title: Bitcoin closed May at $73,568 Market is 50/50 on if Febryary $60k was the bottom, or the bear will continue. IMO data is telling us that we have not seen bottom formation yet, and that there is a >50% probablility that we go lower (below 200wma $61k or realize - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9wZGNUOFlwcF81SW5FR3czRFF2TmRHMkpPdWM3ZlZvOFdYaG1Fam12SDNJV0xRRTVlZjBLTlhpSDgyVGJsbVctTWZzWmlaUFR1LS01ejZHRWltVFZieGQyYjFNYm80dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin closed May at $73,56…

item.title: NYDIG suggests $1.3B IBIT sale was whale exiting directional trade
item.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says a sale below market price and giving up millions of dollars for immediate execution indicates a large directional holder exited a trade on BlackRock’s IBIT last week.

item.title: Citi predicts the tokenized securities market will grow to $5.5 trillion by 2030
item.description: Stablecoins alone will generate a demand for up to $1 trillion worth of onchain U.S. Treasury bills and $2.6 trillion for tokenized stocks, said Citi.

item.title: Whitehat developer unlocks $2 million stuck in a 2016 Ethereum ICO contract for nine years
item.description: 0xflorent, a security researcher, found an integer-overflow flaw in the HongCoin token sale contract that lets the team unlock funds for 48 original investors. It is the second such recovery he has publicized in eight days.

item.title: Sui Foundation says ‘major upgrade’ fixed bugs behind three outages
item.description: The Sui Network's first two outages were caused by bugs introduced in its 1.72 update, while an interim fix deployed to restore the blockchain triggered the third.

item.title: Crypto exploit losses in May fall 90% over month to $68M: CertiK
item.description: CertiK says May is the third month so far in 2026 to record crypto losses under $100 million.

item.title: Cardano Foundation cancels annual conference after failed funding vote
item.description: Cardano Foundation has failed at its second attempt to secure funding from Cardano’s community to fund its annual conference.

item.title: Multicoin Co-founder Kyle Samani: Web3 Is Dead, Only DeFi and DePIN Remain Forward Industries Chairman and Multicoin co-founder Kyle Samani commented, “Web3 is dead. All we have is DeFi and DePIN.” Earlier, StarkWare CEO and Zcash/StarkWare - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBDRVhnd3FnNm90SFZhSmoyZzhBMkdpMmNyb0U4R1pJcmREZmU3SXN2akVfSG9URHZuWHFqVV83OEQ1clZraDRjaXRMME1jUWpLZE83N2R4aWgzRnNGWGp6R3Jvbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Multicoin Co-founder Kyle Samani…

item.title: Long-term holding trends suggest Bitcoin is increasingly being treated as a store of value. Supply is steadily concentrating in long-held positions over time. ₿ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1SZDhrZXBzbHNRRXZiUzNDYnpPbkJRRkwwLURSeWRXY29hSUwtVW03dlN1ZkZQMFpzbGJwZThLYllwSkNGSTlXRjZiRXQ5Z1NSVXBQSUFQdVRrajRv?oc=5" target="_blank">Long-term holding trends suggest Bitcoin i…

item.title: XRP drops to $1.32 as sellers overpower exchange outflows
item.description: XRP hit a 15-week low before stabilizing, with traders watching whether the latest washout turns into a base or another leg lower.

item.title: Three Sui mainnet halts in 48 hours traced to an upgrade bug by developers
item.description: The Sui Foundation's post-mortem published Sunday traces all three outages to interactions between a new address-balance feature shipped in the v1.72 release and the network's existing gas and consensus logic.

item.title: Bitcoin extends slide as spot ETF outflows hit a record while Wall Street rips on AI
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs lost $2.97 billion across 10 trading days through Friday, the longest outflow streak on record. Oil's bounce on the stalled Iran deal added pressure even as global equities hit new highs on the Nvidia and SoftBank AI…

item.title: Aave overhauls listing standards after $230 million rsETH exploit exposed bridge risks
item.description: An official postmortem traced the exploit to a LayerZero bridge verification failure and outlined a sweeping overhaul of Aave's asset-listing standards as DeFi risks shift beyond smart contract bugs.

item.title: The Clarity Act is not just a crypto bill. It's a decision about whether America leads the next financial system or watches from the sidelines. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFA1WkFlNHB5X1Y4OU1yeFI5ZmxlR29KRkFNamNJQUphbUVZcFZiNnZvLVR1SHFRTG9nVEpRTDU1OWcxUXFYMEJmSFZQclFaaXBUNWRqYmkzbzMzR0RiZGVz?oc=5" target="_blank">The Clarity Act is not just a crypto b…

item.title: Wintermute to bring liquidity to booming prediction markets sector
item.description: Wintermute said it will provide “two-sided markets across event contracts on leading venues,” but did not specify what platforms it was trading on.

item.title: White hat hacker recovers $2M from faulty 2016 ICO smart contract
item.description: A white-hat hacker has helped the creators of Hong Coin by showing them how to exploit a flawed admin function on a smart contract and ultimately refund investors after a decade.

item.title: Coinbase makes a major play for India’s booming $3 billion crypto market with local currency launch
item.description: Coinbase announces INR rails to make the platform fully accessible to Indian retail traders.

item.title: US, UK central bankers offer contrary views on stablecoins
item.description: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller told a conference on Sunday that stablecoins expand the reach of US policy while the Bank of England’s Megan Greene expects their popularity will soon fade.

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
item.description: Strategy may be set to announce it has resumed buying Bitcoin after pausing in recent weeks as the biggest crypto looks poised to close out the month down more than 3.5%.

item.title: A massive $1.26 billion sale of BlackRock’s IBIT was likely a rapid exit by a large investor
item.description: NYDIG, meanwhile, rejected the basis-trade theory, citing the large discount and the lack of an unusual spike in corresponding CME bitcoin futures volume.

item.title: How the House Financial Services Committee is taking on tokenization: State of Crypto
item.description: Rep. French Hill, head of the House Financial Services Committee, weighed in on outstanding policy issues in an interview with CoinDesk last month.

item.title: Kraken ‘plans’ regulated perp contracts as rivals are quick off blocks
item.description: In the wake of CFTC approval of perpetual futures contracts tied to the spot price of Bitcoin, Kraken expects to offer those to US institutional clients within "the next month."

item.title: How Stellar became part of DTCC's tokenization push for Wall Street securities onchain
item.description: Wall Street's clearing giant chose a public blockchain with compliance tools built for regulated assets, Stellar Development Foundation CEO Denelle Dixon said.

item.title: BITCOIN DEVELOPER BURAK UNVEILS “CUBE” BTC LAYER 2, CALLS IT THE “HOLY GRAIL” Burak, known for highlighting flaws in Lightning and later creating the Layer 2 called Ark, unveils a new project called Cube. Cube is a Bitcoin-native execution lay - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE8tRG4wZlFCQW01d1JvbWptNGxZYUVBcUYxVnNwZnd5cjZQb1luMXBEWXBqM1ItaW41bUN0RkZVZlBSSTJ6aENvbUNBSlpNVkxFb3pRUWtlR19QcnBubFlGUlM1aXJNZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN DEVELOPER BURAK UNVE…

item.title: Bitcoin preps 3% May downside, but US PMI data may boost BTC price
item.description: Bitcoin faced ending May lower by around 3%, with the possibility of US PMI data giving BTC price action a boost next week.

item.title: How President Trump’s Immigration Order Will Feed the Stablecoin Economy, Bitcoin ATMs
item.description: When the Trump family faced pressure from banks, it embraced crypto. Now, immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally face a similar choice.

item.title: The institutional edge: moomoo targets Wall Street-grade trading tools for retail crypto investors
item.description: The brokerage giant says the future of investing won’t be defined by asset access alone but by the quality of tools investors get.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Working ₿etter." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE43S3hlX2Nfa1pFd0tjMWdWMTh5eWpYLVBRT1M1dWZkMTJWV0dmXzJReEJTOHVjTkJKWU5UUENpVS1VUlpPeWZNamo0Nk8xZk5JbllPRks5bTE5eTRsVDR4UWhB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints that Strategy bought more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0xMDM4VDIzS09BODhORVVzZDdncUZOUldFV0YyWmJOV1MzVnMwTGhjcVdIMmNRZmZmV2hPRktJOEIxbGJUZ2l0QjM4MWdwSGZ3cFRkc3Q2UHAzOTVOUHFyUXMwVVRJcWM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: Bitcoin's wild days are over — and Trace Mayer says that's a good thing
item.description: The creator of the Mayer Multiple argues bitcoin’s growing economic substance is compressing volatility and attracting deeper capital.

item.title: Bitcoin price targets $78K as BTC holders defend 'strongest near-term support'
item.description: Bitcoin’s bounce from a key holder cost-basis level has improved the case for further upside, with historical data pointing to $101,000 as a potential best-case target.

item.title: Vietnam proposes allowing SMEs to use digital assets as loan collateral
item.description: Vietnam’s Ministry of Finance has proposed letting SMEs use digital assets, virtual assets and intellectual property as loan collateral.

item.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
item.description: Gravity Bridge was drained of roughly $5.4 million in a suspected signing key compromise, prompting validators to halt the bridge while an investigation is underway.

item.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
item.description: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.

item.title: XRP Ledger's new proposal blocks the flash loan attacks costing DeFi hundreds of millions
item.description: A draft XRPL amendment notes that flash loan attacks are "structurally impossible" on the network because of how its transactions are built, an architectural quirk that has spared the chain from the exploit class that has cost Ethereum DeF…

item.title: Are you getting desperate, lad? Maybe keep your crypto millions for something else. 😂 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9Ca196QUhmVl9maGd4VUFxU3lmZVFJMGt3bVNrc0k5Q0JTOE5vZW1ZWjRnUmx1eDRvWWp0aFl2dEl6Q3lfTzZFTlNWNnI1Vm8xZFhBQTZSb3VfZmxuUDZLY3RBZmI?oc=5" target="_blank">Are you getting desperate, lad?…

item.title: THE FOUNDER OF ETHEREUM IS WARNING. THE MARKET IS SPRINTING THE OTHER WAY. 🇺🇸 Vitalik Buterin warns crypto dies fast if it stays about gambling with no real-world use. He's not predicting it. He's describing what already happened. Pumpfun. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE90MFYxYndYdWttT3VNQWk1QXBycktONlBoLXFWeHVBeHRnMG5ST0VBcGF4Y0JPNzkyMHBqdXFNWlh6Z0hKdWFLdTNWcGcwblRxM1Q0Q0IyQnBQQXRVUXdsSzRDSUo?oc=5" target="_blank">THE FOUNDER OF ETHEREUM IS WARN…

item.title: Florida Candidate Liquidates $800K in Bitcoin to Bankroll Congressional Bid
item.description: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

item.title: What Is an AI Prompt Injection Attack? The Hidden Threat Hijacking Your Chatbots
item.description: Hackers can hijack ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini with nothing but a sentence. OpenAI says the problem may never be fully solved. Here is what it is, how it works, and how to stay safe.

item.title: Ethereum is not a company. It is global infrastructure controlled by no entity or consortium — like the Internet That’s why institutions bring the most assets onto Ethereum ETH is not a stock or valued on fees ETH is productive money — and that’s the exponential - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9USW91ZUhCRmwzQ0dhTzdVVmNmLW5kai1GWmRqcFEyazdrbUVxQXVTeG5vOGNyaWZaRm9JdFVON1ZCaFBvelg4QjZzbXpDY0JSSUR2N1dRdzc4VmdObXRPOE9KWlU?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is not a company. It i…

item.title: JUST IN: ethereum:0x514910771af9ca656af840dff83e8264ecf986ca futures now trade 24/7 on @CMEGroup, the world's largest CFTC-regulated derivatives exchange. This milestone unlocks enhanced institutional access and reflects the growing maturity of - x.com
